site.tagline: Built Different • Play Fast • Finish Strong

hero.eyebrow: Texas • Select Fastpitch • Bombers Team Hub
hero.title: Bombers Fastpitch
hero.subtitle: Built Different • Play Fast • Finish Strong
hero.body:
CTX Bombers Meza is a 10U select fastpitch softball team based in Georgetown, Texas, built for athletes who want to train with purpose, compete with confidence, and prepare for the next level of the game.
Our mission is to develop elite athletes through disciplined preparation, high standards, game IQ, toughness, and a team-first culture that pushes every player to grow on and off the field.
We are proud to represent Bomber Nation, a championship softball family creating champions since 2001. #BlueBloods

featureCards.title: Team Info
featureCards.body: Mission, culture, coaches, contact info, and Bomber Nation details.

featureCards.title: Roster
featureCards.body: Player cards, profile links, positions, and media-release status.

featureCards.title: GameChanger
featureCards.body: Team schedule, stats references, and sync status.

featureCards.title: NCS Dashboard
featureCards.body: Tournament tracker for events, scores, records, and standings.

announcements.title: Welcome to the Bombers Team Hub
announcements.body: Use the CMS to update team information, social embeds, roster, player profiles, GameChanger references, NCS tournaments, and fundraising content.

social.headline: CTX Bombers Meza Social
social.intro: See reels, tournament weekends, player moments, team culture, practice clips, and shareable Bombers updates directly from the homepage.

socialCards.title: Follow the Team
socialCards.body: Catch highlights, reels, photos, and team updates.

socialCards.title: Share Bombers Updates
socialCards.body: Use the CMS AI helper to draft captions and weekly recaps.

gamechanger.syncNotes: Use public widgets, calendar feeds, or authorized exports. Do not bypass login, paywalls, robots, or platform controls.

ncs.syncNotes: Track public tournament details and your own game results. Use NCS team/event IDs only where pages are public or authorized.

roster.headline: Roster
roster.intro: Roster shown in GameChanger format. Individual profile pages activate per player once written parent/guardian media release is on file.

profile.oneLine: Add a short player description after media release approval.

fundraising.headline: Fundraising
fundraising.intro: Use this fundraising area for team support links, raffle information, sponsor packages, donation QR codes, and fundraising goals.

campaigns.title: Team Sponsors
campaigns.body: Local business sponsorships and sponsor recognition.

campaigns.title: Raffles
campaigns.body: Bat raffles, squares, silent auctions, and team fundraisers.

campaigns.title: Travel Fund
campaigns.body: Support tournament fees, hotels, gas, meals, and team expenses.

campaigns.title: Donations
campaigns.body: Add Venmo, Cash App, PayPal, or donation form links here.

seo.title: Bombers Fastpitch — Texas Select Softball
seo.description: Official Bombers team hub for roster, schedule, GameChanger updates, NCS tournament tracking, social media, and fundraising.

publishing.workflow: Export from CMS, replace cms/content/bombers-site.json, commit to main.
